benchmarkGroups.description: Mean-density body leverage identity Lambda_body = kappa_body R^2 = 2GM/(Rc^2).

fixtures.label: Earth nominal compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: IAU nominal conversion constant; exact by convention, not an empirical current-best-estimate.

fixtures.label: Sun nominal compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: IAU nominal conversion constant; exact by convention, not an empirical current-best-estimate.

fixtures.label: Jupiter nominal compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: IAU nominal conversion constant; exact by convention, not an empirical current-best-estimate.

benchmarkGroups.description: Microscopic compactness references and Planck mass/length unit sanity check.

fixtures.label: Hydrogen atom at Bohr radius
fixtures.referenceNote: Reference leverage is computed from the same mass/radius compactness formula; zero residual is a unit-scale self check.

fixtures.label: Proton at charge radius
fixtures.referenceNote: Reference leverage is computed from the same mass/radius compactness formula; zero residual is a unit-scale self check.

benchmarkGroups.description: Ideal parallel-plate raw Casimir energy-density leverage; diagnostic only.

fixtures.label: Raw 1 nm Casimir leverage at gap scale
fixtures.referenceNote: Raw Casimir leverage is generated from the same ideal parallel-plate model used for the displayed value; zero residual is not an empirical accuracy margin.

fixtures.label: Raw 1 nm Casimir leverage over 1 km
fixtures.referenceNote: Raw Casimir leverage is generated from the same ideal parallel-plate model used for the displayed value; zero residual is not an empirical accuracy margin.

benchmarkGroups.description: External gravity observables used as dimensional calibrators, not NHM2 validators.

fixtures.label: Moon compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: Empirical body calibrator from NASA/NSSDC mass and radius; compactness is computed from those inputs rather than independently observed.

fixtures.label: Saturn compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: Empirical body calibrator from NASA/NSSDC mass and mean radius; compactness is computed from those inputs rather than independently observed.

fixtures.label: Mimas compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: Empirical small-body calibrator; compactness is computed from the listed mass/radius rather than independently observed.

fixtures.label: Ceres compactness
fixtures.referenceNote: Empirical dwarf-planet calibrator; compactness is computed from the listed Dawn-era mass/radius rather than independently observed.

fixtures.label: Potato-radius ice-body scale
fixtures.referenceNote: Self-gravity shape threshold scale generated from a reduced-order density/radius model.

benchmarkGroups.description: Reduced-order tidal-curvature calibration for Saturn ring density-wave response; diagnostic only.

fixtures.label: Saturn B-ring density-wave tidal scale
fixtures.referenceNote: Reduced-order ring-wave lane using Saturn central mass, representative B-ring radius, and 100 km wave lever length; not a precision ring-seismology fit.

forbiddenClaims: does not promote a Casimir source mechanism
does not use external gravitational observables as NHM2 proof
